subcodes.first_line: O Mine Uncle! Render thou thanks that thou hast quaffed from the pure and peerless wine, and hast tasted the honeyed sweetness of reunion with the Lord of Glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عمی شکر نما که از زلال خمر بی مثال نوشیدی و از شهد وصال حضرت ذوالجلال
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
